title: Chowara Chidambaraswamy Temple
tagline: Chowara Chidambaraswamy Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Chowara Chidambaraswamy Temple is located at Chowara in Ernakulam district.
overview.description: Chowara Chidambaraswamy Temple is located at Chowara in Ernakulam district. The presiding deities of north shrine are Shiva in the form of Nataraja, in the sanctum sanctorum facing east. It is believed that this temple is one of the 108 Shiva temples of Kerala and is installed by sage Parasurama dedicated to Shiva. Maha Shivarathri festival of the temple celebrates in the Malayalam month of Kumbha (February - March).

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chalakkal
topPlaces.description: Chalakkal is a village in Ernakulam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: CIAL Solar Power Project
topPlaces.description: The CIAL Solar Power Project is a 50 megawatt (MW) photovoltaic power station built at Cochin International Airport, India, by the company Cochin International Airport Limited (CIAL). Cochin International Airport became the first fully solar powered airport in the world with the commissioning the plant.

topPlaces.name: Kaprassery
topPlaces.description: Kaprassery is a village in the district of Ernakulam and is situated on the National Highway 544 (India) (Old NH47) that stretches from Salem to Kochi. It is located between the two major towns of the Indian state Kerala, namely, Aluva and Angamaly.

topPlaces.name: Choornikkara
topPlaces.description: Choornikkara is a census town located in Aluva in the Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. It is also the headquarters of the Choornikkara Gram Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Edayappuram
topPlaces.description: Edayappuram is a small village in Aluva Taluk, Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala and located at a distance of 3 km from Aluva town and 16 km from Perumbavoor.

topPlaces.name: Thekkumbhagom
topPlaces.description: Thekkumbhagom is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chowara Chidambaraswamy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chowara Chidambaraswamy Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chowara Chidambaraswamy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (3 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (20 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chowara Chidambaraswamy Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chowara Chidambaraswamy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chowara Chidambaraswamy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chowara Chidambaraswamy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chowara Chidambaraswamy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chowwara, Neduvannoor, Chalakkal, CIAL Solar Power Project, Kaprassery.
